info.name: Apache Log4j RCE (CVE-2021-44228)
info.description: Apache Log4j2 <=2.14.1 JNDI features used in configuration, log messages, and parameters do not protect against attacker controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints.

info.name: Atlassian Confluence Broken Access Control
info.description: Atlassian Confluence Data Center and Server contains a broken access control vulnerability that allows an attacker to create unauthorized administrator accounts.

info.name: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting
info.description: The application reflects user input without proper sanitization, allowing execution of arbitrary JavaScript.

info.name: Open Redirect Detection
info.description: The application accepts a user-controlled input that specifies a link to an external site and uses that link in a redirect.

info.name: Nginx Version Detection
info.description: Nginx web server version was detected from HTTP response headers.

info.name: SQL Injection in Login Form
info.description: A SQL injection vulnerability exists in the login form parameter allowing authentication bypass.

info.name: Missing X-Frame-Options Header
info.description: The HTTP response is missing the X-Frame-Options header which can lead to clickjacking attacks.
